titleStmt.title: SII 9.333: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 333. (A.R. No. 126 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE VENUGOPALASVAMI TEMPLE AT MAGALA, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1136, Bhāva, Chaitra, śu. 11, Bṛihaspativāra. The late Mr. Swamikannu Pillai has remarked on this date as follows:—“= A.D. 1215 Thursday March 2; ·48. N.B. A.D. 1214-15 was Bhāva and Śaka 1136 but the Chaitra here referred to is Chaitra at the end not Chaitra at the beginning of the year (vide section III of Indian Chronology)”. But it may be noted that it was not a day of Saṅkramaṇa. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vishṇuvardhana Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). The Uroḍeyas Harihara and Gōvinda, two learned Brāhmans, are stated to have consecrated the image of Śrī-Gōpāla and, with the Mahājanas of Māṇgoḷa, made grants of land and houses for conducting the worship of the god. The genealogy of Harihara and Gōvinda is given and the Brāhman general and minister of the king named Mādhava is praised as a great warrior.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . namastasmai varāhāya līleyōddharatē mahīṁ . khuramadhyagatō yasya mēruḥ
khaṇakhaṇāyatē . dhātā yasya tanūbhavassurasaridyatpādajā pāvanī yaddaṁṣṭrēṇa drutā purā parahitā krō
ḍasya viśvaṁbharā sarvvāsāṁ sadanē vasatyanudinaṁ gōpyāṁ ya Ēkōpi saḥ śrīgōpāḷamahāvibhurddanujajitśakrēśva
raḥ pātu vaḥ . śrīkāṁtōrasthaḷāliṁgitabhujayugaśākhākarāgrapravāḷaprākārōdbhāsi bhāsvadratna
khacitakarṇāvataṁsaṁ supuṟpānīkaṁ dātṛtvasatvaṁ phaḷamagaṇitagōpāḷakaḷpadṛmaṁ trailōkyakādhārani(ṁ)nnūrbba
rigabhimatamaṁ māḷkatiprītiyindaṁ . śatama(ṁ)nyustutanabjanābhanakhiḷaśrīgōpakanyāvarāvṛtavṛndāvanama
dhyagōpanivahaprōdbhāsihēmāṁbarō(ṁ)nnatasūtraṁ kaṭiyoḷpodaḷdeseyaludya(ṁ)nvēṇunādaṁgaḷiṁ ś®tiyaṁ bāji
pa gōpināthanoldīgiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhiyaṁ . gadya . Antī paramēśvaraṁ samastadharmmaparitrāṇārtthaikavarāhadēhōdhṛtaru
ciravasumatikāntānitaṁbapradēśabhūṣaṇāyamānakanakavasanaratnakhacitakaṭisūtradaṁteseva samudrada ma
himeye(ṁ)nteṁdaḍe . vritta . gaṁbhīrasphāravēḷābahaḷaparivṛḍhallōlakallōḷamāḷāraṁbhaprōḍḍīnaphēnaprabaḷajaḷacara
llōṭhapāṭhīnakuṁbhatkuṁbhīrābhīḷanakraprakarakamaṭhanīrēbharatnaprabhāvōjṛṁbhaprōdbhāsivīcīnicayaghanaghanadhvāna
raudraṁ samudraṁ . va . Ā samudramudritamappa jambūdvīpamadhyavartti mēruviṁ dakṣiṇadigbhāgadoḷu . vri .
viḷasadbhāratavarṣavaṁtadaṟoḷudyaddakṣiṇāśāmahīvaḷayaṁ kuntaḷadēśavalli celvaṁ tāḷdirdda puṁḍrēkṣuviṁ kaḷamaśrīṇigaḷiṁ
vanōpavanadiṁ tadrājahaṁsaṁgaḷiṁ sale raṁjippa noṇaṁbavāḍi yesaguṁ viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷu . Antā noṇaṁbavāḍiyanā
ḷuva dakṣiṇacakravartti viṣṇuvarddhanavīraballāḷudēvananvayamenteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . viḷasadviśiṣṭahṛdbyākuḷada tamaṁ
pareye hoysaṇānvayabhūbhṛtkuḷadiṁdamogedu nijabhujabalade jagaccakṣuvenipa vinayādityaṁ . gadya .
tatputrōhyeṟeyaṁganṛpastasyāgramahiṣī nikhiḷasaubhāgyaniḷayā Ēcaladēvī tayōḥ putrāḥ Udayā
dityaballāḷaviṣṇuvarddhana nāmānaḥ tēṣāṁ madhyē nikhiḷarājyavibhavasyaviṣṇuvarddhananāmamahārājasya mahālakṣmī rājñī .
tattanūjō narasiṁhadēvamahānṛpa Āsīt . tadagramahiṣī śrīmadēcaladēvīti vikhyātā . tatastasyā
māvirāsīdvīraballāḷapṛthvīpatiḥ . vri . māḷavakālarūpa magadhēśvarapannegavainatēya pāṁcāḷapa
yōdhibāḍava turaḥkadharādharavajradaṁḍa nēpāḷamanōjakāḷagaḷa gurjjaravairībhasiṁha vīraballāḷa
nṛpāḷa ni(ṁ)nna samanārbhbhuvanādhiparī dharitriyoḷu . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ . dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ . yādavakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi sa(ṁ)mya
ktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja . malaparoḷgaṇḍa . kadanapracaṁḍanēkāṁgavīra . nasahāyaśauryya . śani
vārasiddhi giridurggamalla caladaṁkarāma niśśaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa viṣṇuvarddhanavīraballāḷadēva
nu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . vri . kusumaśaraṁge tānadhikanarkka
janiṁda viśēṣavārppinoḷ śvasanatanūjaniṁ migilu rūpinoḷīva guṇaprabhāvadoḷmisupa bhujapratāpadoḷu pē
ḷamṛtēśapadābjabhṛṁganī masaṇeyadaṁḍanāthanavolārddore maṁtrigaḷī dharitriyoḷu . vaṁdibrātaviśiṣṭadānabhu
vanaprabyaktakaḷpadṛmaḥ saukhyē bhāti śaśāṁkanirmmaḷataraḥ pratyakṣalakṣmīpatiḥ sōyaṁ vairinikāyakhaṇḍanamaha
ddōrdaṁḍayugmā(ṁ)nvitō jībyānmādhavanāyakaḥ sthirataraṁ yāvadravirvarttatē . © . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyāna
dāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarōpāsanāgnihōtradvijagurudēvatāpūjātatpararuṁ . mā
rttaṁḍōjvaḷakīrttiyutaruṁ . śrīmaṁnarasiṁhadēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa śrīmatsarvvanamaśyadanādiya
grahāraṁ māṁgoḷadūraḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa priyaputrarappūraḍeyasaṁtāna vipraprasāda ha
riharadēvananvayameṁteṁdaḍe . vri . vasumatiyeṁba kāṁteya payōdharamauktikahāradante kaṇgeseva mahāgrahāra
menipiṭṭageyoḷvarakaśyapānvayaṁ pasarise pu(ṁ)ṇyamūrtti virupākṣana sādhvi patibratāmadālaseyarasauvvegutsava
de puṭṭida sōmaniḷātaḷāgradoḷu . Ā viprōttama sōmanāthana kulastrīratna sāvitreyappī vikhyāteya nandanarha
riharaṁ tānagrajaṁ viśvavidyāvistāranudāranātananujaṁ gōvindanoldartthiyindīvaṁ śiṣṭajanakkabhīṣṭaphaḷamaṁ lōkaikaka
ḷpadṛmaṁ . ka . hariharana vanite lakṣmige doreyenisuva rēkiyakkanoḷjaniyisidardhdhareyoḷage viṣṇusōmaṁ
varacāvuṁḍākhya nṛhariyenipa tanūjaru . Ātanoḍapuṭṭidaṁ manunītilasanmārganenipa gōvindana satprītiya sati
cāmevvege jātaṁ dhareyoḷage hariharākhyatanūjaṁ © svasti śrīmatśakavarṣada 1136neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada caitra śuddha Ēkā
daśi bṛhaspativāra saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu Ūraḍeya saṁtāna hariyaṇnagōviṁdadēvanavara bhāva virupayyanintinibaruṁ
śrīmadagrahāraṁ māgoḷada grāmamadhyadalli śrīgōpāḷadēvara pratiṣṭheya māḍi Ūraḍeyapramukhaśrīmadaśēṣama
hājanaviṁnūrbbasvāmigaḷa śrīpādapadmagaḷige suvarṇnapuṟpadiṁdārādhisi namaskāraṁ māḍalā mahājanaṁgaḷu rājādhyakṣasahi
tavā dēvara raṁgabōganaivēdyanandādīvigecaitrapavitrasphuṭitakhaṇḍitajīrṇnōddhārakkam sarbbābādhaparihāravāgi Ūraḍeya
ra śrīmānyadoḷage biṭṭa bhūmi hiriyūraḍeyara modalahasuge koḍeyāladalli māniyoḷage keṁgāḍu mattaroṁbhattu .
maṁneyageṟeya keḷage hiriyūraḍeyara tōṭagaṭṭu mattareraḍu dēviṁgeṟeyoḷage naḍuvaṇūraḍeyara māhikūceṇnaṁ
gaḷa Eremattaraidu Alli kiṟiyamodala taṁḍagadakūceṇaṁgaḷa sthaḷa mattareraḍu Alli brahmadēvapaṭṭavardhdhanara sthaḷa mattareraḍu .
kiṟiya modalaSome space is left blank at
caṁdramaṁciyaṇnaṁgaḷa maga guṁḍadēvapeddi banniya benakanalli śrīdharadēvara keyyiṁ baḍaga nākaṟahasugeyalu koṭṭa mattaru nālku
gūḷigana kaṭṭiyalli mahājanaṁgaḷa kaiyyalu dhāregoṁḍa keyi mattaru mūṟu . Ūraḍevāḷa modalahasuge Uṁ
ḍige mattaru nālku . Ūraḍegēriyoḷage bāviyiṁ paḍuva brahmadēvapaṭṭavardhdhanaru koṭṭa teṁkavāgila maneyoṁdu Ūraḍeda
ḍada baḍagaṇa mūḍaṇa gōṭinalli brahmadēvapaṭṭavardhdhanaru koṭṭa teṁkavāgila tuḍukeyoṁdu . Intī dharmmamaninnūrvvaruṁ prati
pāḷisuvaru . Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru Amāvāsye sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa vyatīpāta saṁkramaṇavintī mahāti
thiyaṁdu sāvira kavilegaḷa kōḍuṁ koḷaginalu suvarṇnadiṁ kaṭṭisi vēdapāragatarappa sahasrabrāhmaṇarige vāraṇāśikurukṣētra
dalu dānamaṁ koṭṭa phalamakku . Intī dharmma(ṁ)manaḷidavarā tithiyalā kavilegaḷanā brāhmaṇaruvanā kṣētradalu svahastadiṁ koṁda ma
hāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
